name: Green Beans in Basil Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Snap off the tips of the green beans.
2. Bring a large casserole pot of salted water to a boil.
3. Add the beans and cook for 10 minutes or until barely tender. Drain immediately and run under cold water. This retains their freshness and color.
4. In a large skillet, heat 6 tbsp olive oil over medium heat.
5. Add the onions and cook them for 10 minutes, covered, until they are soft but not browned.
6. Stir in the tomatoes, salt, pepper, and Bouquet Garni. Cook the mixture for 10 to 15 minutes over fairly high heat until it is very thick. Remove the bouquet garni.
7. Add the drained green beans to the skillet and simmer covered for an additional 5 minutes.
8. In a blender or food processor, puree the basil, garlic, parsley, and remaining olive oil.
9. Pour the purée into the tomato and bean mixture in the skillet.
10. Correct the seasoning with salt and pepper if needed.
11. Heat through and serve.
